description: Rigol DM3058 / DM3058E 5.5-digit bench digital multimeter with SCPI remote control over USB, GPIB, RS-232 and LAN (GPIB and LAN are only available on the DM3058). This definition covers the native RIGOL command set (IEEE 488 common commands, STATus, SYSTem, and the :CALCulate / :FUNCtion / :FUNCtion2 / :LXI / :MEASure / :RATE / :SYSTem / :TRIGger / :UTILity subsystems). The instrument also accepts compatible Agilent and Fluke command languages, which are not enumerated here.

identity.description: Standard SCPI identification query. Returns an instrument ID string of at least 35 characters.

commands.name: clear_status
commands.description: Resets the values in all Event Registers and clears the Error Queue.

commands.name: event_status_enable
commands.description: Sets or queries the enable value of the Event Status Register (ESR).

commands.name: event_status_register
commands.description: Queries the event value of the Event Status Register (ESR).

commands.name: identify
commands.description: Queries the equipment ID. Returns a string of at least 35 characters.

commands.name: operation_complete
commands.description: Sets the Operation Complete bit (bit 0) of the ESR to 1 after the current operation completes. The query returns 1 when the current operation has finished.

commands.name: power_on_status_clear
commands.description: Sets or queries the power-on status clear flag. *PSC 0 keeps register enable values at last state on power-on; *PSC 1 resets them on power-on.

commands.name: reset
commands.description: Resets the instrument.

commands.name: service_request_enable
commands.description: Sets or queries the enable value of the Status Byte Register (STB).

commands.name: status_byte
commands.description: Queries the condition value of the Status Byte Register (STB).

commands.name: trigger
commands.description: Generates a trigger signal when the instrument is in the Wait-for-trigger state.

commands.name: self_test
commands.description: Queries the self-test result. Returns 0 (pass) or 1 (failure).

commands.name: wait
commands.description: Waits until all pending operations complete.

commands.name: status_operation_condition
commands.description: Queries the Condition Register of the Operation Status Register queue.

commands.name: status_operation_enable
commands.description: Sets or queries the Enable Register of the Operation Status Register queue.

commands.name: status_operation_event
commands.description: Queries the Event Register of the Operation Status Register queue.

commands.name: status_preset
commands.description: Resets the Enable Register of both the Operation Status Register and the Questionable Status Register queues.

commands.name: status_questionable_condition
commands.description: Queries the Condition Register of the Questionable Status Register queue.

commands.name: status_questionable_enable
commands.description: Sets or queries the Enable Register of the Questionable Status Register queue.

commands.name: status_questionable_event
commands.description: Queries the Event Register of the Questionable Status Register queue.

commands.name: system_beeper
commands.description: Issues a single beep immediately. The beeper must be enabled (SYSTem:BEEPer:STATe ON) for this to take effect.

commands.name: system_beeper_state
commands.description: Sets or queries the beeper state. ON (1) enables, OFF (0) disables.

commands.name: system_error
commands.description: Queries the next error in the error queue. Returns the error number and description, or 0,"No error".

commands.name: system_version
commands.description: Queries the SCPI version supported by the instrument, e.g. 1999.0.

commands.name: calculate_function
commands.description: Sets or queries the math function. Default NONE disables math.

parameters.name: function
parameters.description: TOTAL enables MIN, MAX and AVERAGE statistics together; PF is the limit (pass/fail) operation.

commands.name: calculate_statistic_min
commands.description: Queries the minimum of the current statistic. Valid only when MIN operation is enabled.

commands.name: calculate_statistic_max
commands.description: Queries the maximum of the current statistic. Valid only when MAX operation is enabled.

commands.name: calculate_statistic_average
commands.description: Queries the average of the current statistic. Valid only when AVERAGE operation is enabled.

commands.name: calculate_statistic_count
commands.description: Queries the number of measurements counted for the current statistic. Counting restarts when the measurement function changes.

commands.name: calculate_statistic_state
commands.description: Sets or queries the statistic state.

commands.name: calculate_rel_offset
commands.description: Sets or queries the offset of the REL (relative) operation for the current measurement. Range depends on measurement type.

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Consecutive real number; DEF=0. Type-dependent: DCV +/-1200 V, ACV +/-900 V, DCI/ACI +/-12 A, Resistance +/-1.2e8 Ohm, Capacitance +/-1.2e-2 F, Frequency +/-1.2e6 Hz.

commands.name: calculate_rel_state
commands.description: Sets or queries the REL (relative) operation state.

commands.name: calculate_db
commands.description: Queries the dB value of the current measurement. Valid only when dB operation is enabled.

commands.name: calculate_db_reference
commands.description: Sets or queries the dB reference value. Valid only when dB operation is enabled.

parameters.name: range
parameters.range: -120 dBm to +120 dBm; MIN=-120, MAX=+120, DEF=0

commands.name: calculate_db_state
commands.description: Sets or queries the dB operation state.

commands.name: calculate_dbm
commands.description: Queries the dBm value of the current measurement. Valid only when dBm operation is enabled.

commands.name: calculate_dbm_reference
commands.description: Sets or queries the dBm reference resistance. Valid only when dBm operation is enabled.

commands.name: calculate_dbm_state
commands.description: Sets or queries the dBm operation state.

commands.name: calculate_pf
commands.description: Queries the result of the current PF (pass/fail) operation. Returns PASS, HI or LO.

commands.name: calculate_pf_lower
commands.description: Sets or queries the lower limit of the PF operation. Range depends on measurement type.

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Type-dependent (Table 3-3): DCV +/-1200 V, ACV 0-900 V, DCI +/-12 A, ACI 0-12 A, Resistance 0-1.2e8 Ohm, Capacitance 0-1.2e-2 F, Period 1.0e-6 to 100 s, Frequency 0-1.2e6 Hz. DEF=0.

commands.name: calculate_pf_upper
commands.description: Sets or queries the upper limit of the PF operation. Range depends on measurement type (see Table 3-3). DEF=1.

commands.name: calculate_pf_state
commands.description: Sets or queries the PF (pass/fail) operation state.

commands.name: function_query
commands.description: Queries the current (main-display) measurement function. Returns DCV, ACV, DCI, ACI, RESISTANCE, CAPACITANCE, CONTINUITY, FRESISTANCE, DIODE, FREQUENCY or PERIOD.

commands.name: function_voltage_dc
commands.description: Enables DC voltage measurement (:FUNCtion? returns DCV).

commands.name: function_voltage_ac
commands.description: Enables AC voltage measurement (:FUNCtion? returns ACV).

commands.name: function_current_dc
commands.description: Enables DC current measurement (:FUNCtion? returns DCI).

commands.name: function_current_ac
commands.description: Enables AC current measurement (:FUNCtion? returns ACI).

commands.name: function_resistance
commands.description: Enables 2-wire resistance measurement (:FUNCtion? returns 2WR).

commands.name: function_fresistance
commands.description: Enables 4-wire resistance measurement (:FUNCtion? returns 4WR).

commands.name: function_frequency
commands.description: Enables frequency measurement (:FUNCtion? returns FREQ).

commands.name: function_period
commands.description: Enables period measurement (:FUNCtion? returns PERI).

commands.name: function_continuity
commands.description: Enables continuity measurement (:FUNCtion? returns CONT).

commands.name: function_diode
commands.description: Enables diode measurement (:FUNCtion? returns DIODE).

commands.name: function_capacitance
commands.description: Enables capacitance measurement (:FUNCtion? returns CAP).

commands.name: function2_query
commands.description: Queries the current vice (secondary) display measurement. Valid only when dual display is enabled. Returns DCV, ACV, DCI, ACI, 2WR, CAP, 4WR, FREQ or PERI.

commands.name: function2_value1
commands.description: Queries the measured value of the main display. Valid only when dual display is enabled.

commands.name: function2_value2
commands.description: Queries the measured value of the vice (secondary) display. Valid only when dual display is enabled.

commands.name: function2_voltage_dc
commands.description: Sets the vice display to DC voltage measurement.

commands.name: function2_voltage_ac
commands.description: Sets the vice display to AC voltage measurement.

commands.name: function2_current_dc
commands.description: Sets the vice display to DC current measurement.

commands.name: function2_current_ac
commands.description: Sets the vice display to AC current measurement.

commands.name: function2_frequency
commands.description: Sets the vice display to frequency measurement.

commands.name: function2_period
commands.description: Sets the vice display to period measurement.

commands.name: function2_resistance
commands.description: Sets the vice display to 2-wire resistance measurement.

commands.name: function2_fresistance
commands.description: Sets the vice display to 4-wire resistance measurement.

commands.name: function2_capacitance
commands.description: Sets the vice display to capacitance measurement.

commands.name: function2_on
commands.description: Queries the current vice display function.

commands.name: function2_clear
commands.description: Disables the vice (dual) display.

commands.name: lxi_identify
commands.description: Turns on or off the display of the LXI label in the user interface. DM3058 only.

commands.name: lxi_mdns_enable
commands.description: Turns on or off the multicast DNS (mDNS) of the instrument. DM3058 only.

commands.name: lxi_mdns_hostname_desired
commands.description: Sets or queries the desired mDNS host name (ASCII string). DM3058 only.

commands.name: lxi_mdns_hostname_resolved
commands.description: Queries the mDNS host name currently in effect (ASCII string). DM3058 only.

commands.name: lxi_mdns_servicename_desired
commands.description: Sets or queries the desired mDNS service name (ASCII string). DM3058 only.

commands.name: lxi_mdns_servicename_resolved
commands.description: Queries the mDNS service name currently in effect (ASCII string). DM3058 only.

commands.name: lxi_reset
commands.description: Restores the LAN parameters of the instrument to their default values. DM3058 only.

commands.name: lxi_restart
commands.description: Restarts the LAN using the current parameters. DM3058 only.

commands.name: measure_new_data
commands.description: Queries whether new data has been acquired under the current trigger setting. Returns TRUE or FALSE.

commands.name: measure_type
commands.description: Selects the measurement type as Auto or Manual.

commands.name: measure_voltage_dc_query
commands.description: Queries the current measured DC voltage value in scientific notation (V). Unavailable in dual display.

commands.name: measure_voltage_dc_range
commands.description: Sets the range (and resolution) of DC voltage measurement; switches to Manual type. Codes 0..4 = 200 mV / 2 V / 20 V / 200 V / 1000 V.

commands.name: measure_voltage_dc_range_query
commands.description: Queries the current DC voltage range code (0..4). DC voltage must have been used at least once.

commands.name: measure_voltage_dc_impedance
commands.description: Sets or queries the DC input impedance. 10G (>10 GOhm) is available only on the 200mV and 2V ranges.

commands.name: measure_voltage_dc_filter
commands.description: Sets or queries the AC filter state under DC voltage measurement.

commands.name: measure_voltage_ac_query
commands.description: Queries the current measured AC voltage value in scientific notation (V). Unavailable in dual display.

commands.name: measure_voltage_ac_range
commands.description: Sets the range of AC voltage measurement. Codes 0..4 = 200 mV / 2 V / 20 V / 200 V / 750 V.

commands.name: measure_voltage_ac_range_query
commands.description: Queries the current AC voltage range code (0..4).

commands.name: measure_current_dc_query
commands.description: Queries the current measured DC current value in scientific notation (A). Unavailable in dual display.

commands.name: measure_current_dc_range
commands.description: Sets the range (and resolution) of DC current measurement; switches to Manual type. Codes 0..5 = 200 uA / 2 mA / 20 mA / 200 mA / 2 A / 10 A.

commands.name: measure_current_dc_range_query
commands.description: Queries the current DC current range code (0..5).

commands.name: measure_current_dc_filter
commands.description: Sets or queries the AC filter state under DC current measurement.

commands.name: measure_current_ac_query
commands.description: Queries the current measured AC current value in scientific notation (A). Unavailable in dual display.

commands.name: measure_current_ac_range
commands.description: Sets the range of AC current measurement; switches to Manual type. Codes 0..3 = 20 mA / 200 mA / 2 A / 10 A.

commands.name: measure_current_ac_range_query
commands.description: Queries the current AC current range code (0..3). Valid only when AC current measurement is enabled.

commands.name: measure_resistance_query
commands.description: Queries the measured 2-wire resistance value in scientific notation (Ohm). Unavailable in dual display.

commands.name: measure_resistance_range
commands.description: Sets the 2-wire resistance range. Codes 0..6 = 200 Ohm / 2 kOhm / 20 kOhm / 200 kOhm / 1 MOhm / 10 MOhm / 100 MOhm.

commands.name: measure_resistance_range_query
commands.description: Queries the current 2-wire resistance range code (0..6).

commands.name: measure_fresistance_query
commands.description: Queries the measured 4-wire resistance value in scientific notation (Ohm). Unavailable in dual display.

commands.name: measure_fresistance_range
commands.description: Sets the 4-wire resistance range. Codes 0..6 same as 2-wire (200 Ohm .. 100 MOhm).

commands.name: measure_fresistance_range_query
commands.description: Queries the current 4-wire resistance range code (0..6).

commands.name: measure_frequency_query
commands.description: Queries the measured frequency value of the AC signal in scientific notation (Hz). Frequency range 20 Hz to 1 MHz. Unavailable in dual display.

commands.name: measure_frequency_range
commands.description: Sets the input-signal voltage range used under frequency measurement (same range codes as AC voltage, 0..4).

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Same as AC voltage ranges (200mV..750V); DEF=20V.

commands.name: measure_frequency_range_query
commands.description: Queries the AC voltage range code (0..4) used under frequency measurement.

commands.name: measure_period_query
commands.description: Queries the measured period value of the AC signal in scientific notation (s). Unavailable in dual display.

commands.name: measure_period_range
commands.description: Sets the input-signal voltage range used under period measurement (same range codes as AC voltage, 0..4). Period range 1 us to 50 ms.

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Same as AC voltage ranges; DEF=20V.

commands.name: measure_period_range_query
commands.description: Queries the AC voltage range code (0..4) used under period measurement.

commands.name: measure_continuity_query
commands.description: Queries the measured resistance value under continuity measurement in scientific notation (Ohm).

commands.name: measure_continuity_threshold
commands.description: Sets the resistance limit (beep threshold) under continuity measurement. Consecutive integer 1 to 2000 Ohm, default 10 Ohm.

commands.name: measure_diode_query
commands.description: Queries the voltage across the diode in scientific notation (V). Default beep condition is 1 V <= Vmeasured <= 2.4 V.

commands.name: measure_capacitance_query
commands.description: Queries the measured capacitance value in scientific notation (F). Unavailable in dual display.

commands.name: measure_capacitance_range
commands.description: Sets the capacitance range. Codes 0..5 = 2 nF / 20 nF / 200 nF / 2 uF / 200 uF / 10000 uF.

commands.name: measure_capacitance_range_query
commands.description: Queries the current capacitance range code (0..5).

commands.name: rate_voltage_dc
commands.description: Sets or queries the measuring rate of DC voltage. F=Fast (123 rdg/s), M=Medium (20 rdg/s), S=Slow (2.5 rdg/s). Query valid only when DCV is enabled.

commands.name: rate_voltage_ac
commands.description: Sets or queries the measuring rate of AC voltage (F/M/S). Query valid only when ACV is enabled.

commands.name: rate_current_dc
commands.description: Sets or queries the measuring rate of DC current (F/M/S). Query valid only when DC current is enabled.

commands.name: rate_current_ac
commands.description: Sets or queries the measuring rate of AC current (F/M/S). Query valid only when AC current is enabled.

commands.name: rate_resistance
commands.description: Sets or queries the measuring rate of 2-wire resistance (F/M/S). Query valid only when 2-wire resistance is enabled.

commands.name: rate_fresistance
commands.description: Sets or queries the measuring rate of 4-wire resistance (F/M/S). Query valid only when 4-wire resistance is enabled.

commands.name: rate_sensor
commands.description: Sets or queries the measuring rate of sensor measurement (M or S only). Query valid only when sensor function is enabled.

commands.name: system_configure_powerswitch
commands.description: Enables or disables the front-panel power switch at power-on. OFF|0 starts automatically when powered; ON|1 requires pressing the front-panel power switch.

commands.name: system_configure_poweron
commands.description: Sets the power-on mode. LAST restores the configuration before the last power cut; DEF uses default configuration.

commands.name: system_configure_default
commands.description: Sets the system configuration to default.

commands.name: system_language
commands.description: Sets or queries the system language.

commands.name: system_format_decimal
commands.description: Sets or queries the decimal display format. Note: changing this can also affect the data delimiter.

commands.name: system_format_separate
commands.description: Sets or queries the data delimiter format. ON = default comma, NONE = no delimiter, SPACE = a space.

commands.name: system_display_bright
commands.description: Sets or queries the screen brightness. Integer 0 to 32, default 22.

commands.name: system_display_contrast
commands.description: Sets or queries the screen contrast. Integer 0 to 32, default 19.

commands.name: system_display_invert
commands.description: Enables inverse (inverted) screen display.

commands.name: trigger_source
commands.description: Sets or queries the trigger source. AUTO = auto trigger, SINGLE = single trigger, EXT = external trigger.

commands.name: trigger_auto_interval
commands.description: Sets or queries the auto-trigger interval (ms). Min interval and default depend on rate: Fast default 8 ms (range 8-2000), Medium default 50 ms (range 50-2000), Slow default 400 ms (range 400-2000).

commands.name: trigger_auto_hold
commands.description: Sets or queries the reading-hold function under auto trigger.

commands.name: trigger_auto_hold_sensitivity
commands.description: Sets or queries the auto-trigger hold sensitivity. Codes: 0=0.01% (MIN), 1=0.1%, 2=1% (DEF), 3=10% (MAX).

commands.name: trigger_single
commands.description: Sets or queries the number of samples per single trigger. Integer 1 to 2000, default 1.

commands.name: trigger_single_triggered
commands.description: Triggers the multimeter once manually (equivalent to a manual single trigger from the front panel).

commands.name: trigger_ext
commands.description: Sets or queries the external trigger type. RISE (default), FALL, HIGH (high level) or LOW (low level).

commands.name: trigger_vmc_polarity
commands.description: Sets or queries the VM Complete (VMC) output polarity. POS (positive, default) or NEG (negative).

commands.name: trigger_vmc_pulsewidth
commands.description: Sets or queries the VM Complete (VMC) output pulse width in ms (default 100 ms). Allowed range depends on sample rate: S 1-399 ms, M 1-49 ms, F 1-7 ms.

commands.name: utility_lan_dhcp
commands.description: Sets or queries the DHCP state for the LAN interface. DM3058 only.

commands.name: utility_lan_autoip
commands.description: Sets or queries the Auto IP state for the LAN interface. DM3058 only.

commands.name: utility_lan_manuip
commands.description: Sets or queries the Manual IP state for the LAN interface. DM3058 only.

commands.name: utility_lan_ip
commands.description: Sets or queries the IP address for LAN connection (default 168.254.0.238). DM3058 only.

commands.name: utility_lan_mask
commands.description: Sets or queries the subnet mask for LAN connection (default 255.255.255.0). DM3058 only.

commands.name: utility_lan_gateway
commands.description: Sets or queries the gateway for LAN connection (default 172.16.3.1). DM3058 only.

commands.name: utility_lan_dns
commands.description: Sets or queries the DNS server address for LAN connection (default 0.0.0.0). DM3058 only.

commands.name: utility_gpib_address
commands.description: Sets or queries the GPIB address. Integer 0 to 30, default 7. DM3058 only.

commands.name: utility_rs232_baud
commands.description: Sets or queries the RS-232 baud rate.

commands.name: utility_rs232_parity
commands.description: Sets or queries the RS-232 parity. NONE = no parity / 8 data bits, ODD = odd / 7 data bits, EVEN = even / 7 data bits. Query returns NONE8BITS, ODD7BITS or EVEN7BITS.
